_doc: Each legacy has: id (stable string), title, flavor (shown earned), hint (shown locked), predicate.
_doc_predicate_kinds: totalWins / totalRuns / totalDeaths / totalTiles / totalMoves / longestStreak / beastKills / banditKills / level   { kind, gte: <number> }
thisRunWin / thisRunDeath / thisRunWinAtFullHp / thisRunWinAtHp1 / thisRunFullExploration   { kind }
thisRunMaxTurns   { kind: 'thisRunMaxTurns', lte: <number> }   (win in <= N turns)

title: First Pilgrimage
flavor: You set foot on the road.

title: Wanderer
flavor: A hundred steps and many to come.
hint: Take 100 steps in total across all pilgrimages.

title: Untouched
flavor: The road did not lay a hand on you.
hint: Reach the shrine without losing any HP.

title: Narrow Escape
flavor: One more step would have been the last.
hint: Reach the shrine with exactly 1 HP remaining.

title: Swift Pilgrim
flavor: The shrine knew you were coming.
hint: Win a pilgrimage in 6 turns or fewer.

title: The Mire Knows You
flavor: The swamp keeps a list, and your name is on it.
hint: Be claimed by the swamp 5 times.
